response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, and cloud platforms, along with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest — all core requirements. His open-source contributions, architecture experience, and cross-stack adaptability strongly align with the role’s demands, despite limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling development
Strong open-source contributions and testing culture (Vitest, TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles
German language proficiency is only basic, may limit collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Resume lacks detail on relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) usage in recent projects
